Hello, World!

2025-04-16

Welcome to your retro‑cozy digital garden! This is a sample post written in Markdown.

$ echo "Hello, world!"
  • You can use Markdown for formatting.
  • Posts go in the _posts/ folder, named YYYY-MM-DD-title.md.
  • Tags appear in the menu.
